creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 4.2.1

svn diff:

--- Makefile    (revision 399171)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$

 PORTNAME=      node
-PORTVERSION=   4.1.2

 DISTVERSIONPREFIX=     v
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://nodejs.org/dist/v${PORTVERSION}/
Index: distinfo
===================================================================

+++ distinfo    (working copy)
